flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Victor Valley College rose 33% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.8k → $5.0k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Victor Valley College rose 29% between 2007 and 2010 ($490 → $634).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Victor Valley College rose 265% between 2007 and 2010 (3.0k → 10.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Victor Valley College rose 162% between 2007 and 2010 (19.9% → 52.0%).
